caption: A man with a distinctive tall, silver-grey hairstyle and glasses sits in a podcast studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a bowtie, and oversized headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and posters. On the right side of the scene, a white garment bag and other clothing are visible. The "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" logo appears as a graphic overlay on the left and right sides of the frame. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, subtly shifting his expression and head angle as he talks, while the background and equipment remain static.
